data.description:
## What
Rename REBAR_PUSH -> REBAR_SYNC_PUSH (always/async/off) and REBAR_NO_SYNC -> REBAR_SYNC_PULL (positive on/off, default on; flips the negative boolean). Fold _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC into REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off + REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off (delete the private flag). CLI --no-sync -> --no-pull.

## Files
src/rebar/_store/push.py, src/rebar/_reads.py, src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py, src/rebar/graph/_links.py, src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py, tests/**

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] REBAR_SYNC_PUSH/REBAR_SYNC_PULL with deprecation aliases (REBAR_PUSH, REBAR_NO_SYNC); value map for the NO_SYNC->PULL boolean flip
- [ ] _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC removed; test harnesses use REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off/REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off
- [ ] --no-pull flag; docs; full suite green
data.title: EV-1: unify sync model -> REBAR_SYNC_PUSH / REBAR_SYNC_PULL
